openclaw_check.reason: 版本差距已拉大；本次升级同时覆盖 API 兼容、工具可见性、Skills 安装体验以及多渠道稳定性修复。
changes: Gateway/OpenAI compatibility: add /v1/models and /v1/embeddings; forward explicit model overrides for broader client and RAG compatibility.
Make /tools show what the current agent can actually use right now, plus Control UI 'Available Right Now'.
Skills install UX upgrade: one-click install recipes, Needs Setup status filters, and clearer API key guidance.
Microsoft Teams official SDK migration plus better AI-agent UX.
Security and reliability fixes: media sandbox bypass closure, restart wake path, sequential channel startup isolation.

must_read.title: China’s DeepSeek, MiniMax AI models overtake US rivals in token consumption
must_read.why_matters: 市场开始用 token 和付费调用投票，不再只看 benchmark；中国模型在编程、多模态、长上下文上的差距正在缩小。

must_read.title: Oracle Positions AI Database 26ai to Lead $1.2 Trillion Market by Bridging the Agentic Reasoning Gap
must_read.why_matters: agent stack 正在往 data layer 下沉，memory / policy / security / orchestration 直接做进数据库，能显著降低胶水层税。

must_read.title: Freshworks cofounder rejects ‘SaaSpocalypse,’ says AI agents won’t kill industry
must_read.why_matters: agent 是 brain，SaaS 仍是 memory + nervous system；真正的威胁不是 demo 级 vibe coding，而是 AI-native 重构。

worth_a_look.title: The agentic workforce is here: Why Cisco just put a 'Claw' on AI security
worth_a_look.why_matters: 安全摩擦不是拖慢 agent 落地，反而是让 agent 真能进生产环境的前提。

worth_a_look.title: Anaplan Announces Latest AI-Driven Innovations and Applications to Advance Enterprise Decision-Making
worth_a_look.why_matters: enterprise agent 的核心卖点不是会聊，而是可算、可审计、可落账。

worth_a_look.title: How to Build a Vision-Guided Web AI Agent with MolmoWeb-4B Using Multimodal Reasoning and Action Prediction
worth_a_look.why_matters: web agent 不一定非吃 DOM，直接基于 screenshot 做 reasoning + action prediction，也能跑出可用闭环。

wildcard.title: Why Scientists Made AI Agents Ruder and Got Smarter Results
wildcard.why_matters: 多 agent 推理里，过度礼貌会降低批判强度；内部 debate agent 也许该更 blunt，对外再保持礼貌。

wildcard.title: AI News Last 24 Hours (March 24, 2026): Models & Breakthroughs
wildcard.why_matters: 低延迟、小模型、本地运行、可调 reasoning effort 正在汇成同一个方向——agent 成本结构开始重写。
